# Figure description: II.jpg

**Source**: `36572_Smolianova_1984/raw_graphics/Список_приложений/II.jpg`  
**Generated by**: claude-sonnet-4-6

---

## Figure Type

This is a **data inventory table** (inventory list / register of graphical materials), not a geological map or geophysical profile. It is a numbered catalogue page (page 11) listing graphic attachments/figures included in the report, organized in columnar format with 7 columns. This type of document is standard in Soviet-era geological reports as an appendix listing all графические приложения (graphic appendices).

---

## Coverage and Subject

The table covers **graphic materials numbered 23–44** associated with the regional survey of map sheets in the **M-42 and N-42 series** at **1:200,000 scale** (and some at 1:500,000 and 1:1,000,000). The specific map sheet codes visible include:

- M-42-XV, M-42-XIV, M-42-IX, M-42-VIII, M-42-VII, M-42-II, M-42-III
- M-42-XXXIII, M-42-XXXIV, M-42-XXXV, M-42-IV, M-42-V
- N-42-126-B, G; 128-G; 129-B, G; 137-B, G; 138, 139, 140, 141
- M-42-3-B, G; III; 7-A, B

The geographic focus is **northern Kazakhstan**, specifically including the **western part of the Teniz Depression (Тенизская впадина)** and its framing structures.

---

## Key Content

The table catalogues the following categories of graphical materials:

1. **Item 23** — Картограмма геофизической изученности (Geophysical survey coverage index map), scale 1:1,000,000, 6 copies, not secret, on cartographic paper.

2. **Items 24–32** — Карта полезных ископаемых (Mineral resources/deposits map) for multiple individual 1:200,000 map sheets (M-42-XV through M-42-XXXIV/XXXV/IV/V), 1 copy each, not secret, on batman (tracing paper/vellum).

3. **Item 33** — Условные обозначения к картам прогнозов с элементами закономерностей размещения полезных ископаемых (Legend/key for mineral prognosis maps with elements of mineral distribution patterns), 1 copy, not secret, on cartographic paper.

4. **Items 34–42** — Карта прогнозов с элементами закономерностей размещения полезных ископаемых (Mineral prognosis map with elements of mineral distribution regularities) for the same series of 1:200,000 map sheets (M-42-XV through M-42-XXXIV/XXXV/IV/V), 1 copy each, not secret.

5. **Item 43** — Тектоническая схема западной части Тенизской впадины и её обрамления (Tectonic scheme of the western part of the Teniz Depression and its framing), scale 1:500,000, 1 copy, not secret, on cartographic paper.

6. **Item 44** — Карта изолиний Vzz (Map of Vzz isolines — vertical gravity gradient or similar geophysical parameter) covering sheets N-42-126-B,G; 128-G; 129-B,G; 137-B,G; 138–141; M-42-3-B,G; III; 7-A,B, scale 1:500,000, 1 copy, not secret, on cartographic paper.

All items are marked **"не секретно"** (not secret). Check marks (✓) appear beside most entries in column 1, indicating that these materials have been verified or received.

- Col 5: Number of copies (количество экземпляров)

- *Карта прогнозов с элементами закономерностей размещения полезных ископаемых. М-42-ХУ* [and subsequent]

---

## Research Value

This inventory table is essential for understanding the **complete set of graphical deliverables** produced by the 1983–1984 survey, enabling a researcher or AI assistant to know exactly which maps and schemes exist, at what scales, and which map sheets they cover — critical for locating specific geological or geophysical products within the archive. The presence of both **mineral resources maps** and **mineral prognosis maps** for all constituent 1:200,000 sheets confirms that the report provides systematic coverage of the region's economic geology potential.
